items.title: China’s new ethnic unity law extends its legal reach overseas
items.summary: Rather than promote ethnic harmony, activists say the law could justify transnational repression.

items.title: Russia Strikes Ukraine as Explosions Rock Capital of Kyiv
items.summary: At least 13 people were killed in the assault, which began hours after President Volodymyr Zelensky of Ukraine warned that Russia was preparing another “massive strike” on Kyiv.
